// Project 01 of 07

CheckURL — Cybersecurity Startup GTM Strategy

Marketing Strategy · Illinois Tech · August – December 2025

B2C Product Browser Extension Grade: A
Developed a comprehensive go-to-market strategy for CheckURL — a B2C cybersecurity browser extension that protects everyday users from phishing links and malicious URLs through real-time, color-coded safety ratings.

// Product

CheckURL's Seamless Solution

🔍
Automatic Verification
Links verified directly within your browser, instantly — no extra clicks or copy-pasting.
🚦
Real-time Feedback
Color-coded safety ratings delivered the moment you hover over any link.
🛡️
Seamless Protection
In-browser security with zero extra clicks — works silently in the background.

Safety Signal System

🟢 Safe 🟡 Cautious 🔴 Malicious

// Brand Vision

From Firefox to Global Safety

01
Firefox Only Extension
Initial focus on Firefox users to establish market presence.
02
Multi-Browser Platform
Expand to Chrome, Safari, Edge for exponential user growth.
03
Household Digital Safety Tool
Combine affordable design, education & real-time security intelligence.

// Strategy

How I Built the GTM Plan

Situation
Cybersecurity threats are increasingly targeting non-technical consumers. CheckURL needed a clear path to market — but lacked a defined customer profile, positioning, or campaign roadmap.
Task
As part of the Marketing Strategy course at Illinois Tech, I was tasked with creating a complete, investor-ready GTM strategy from the ground up — covering every stage from awareness to conversion.
Action
Built out the following deliverables:
  • Customer Personas — Three segments: remote workers, small business owners, and college students
  • Competitive Analysis Matrix — Benchmarked 8 competitors across price, features, UX, and brand perception
  • Brand Positioning — "For non-technical internet users who fear digital threats, CheckURL is the only cybersecurity tool that combines one-click simplicity with real-time AI protection."
  • 6-Month Campaign Calendar — Paid social, SEO, influencer partnerships, and email nurture flows
  • Revenue Model — Tiered pricing with Year 1 target of 148K users, growing to 444K in Year 2
▸ Grade: A  ·  Professor feedback: "Overall, a great complete plan."  ·  SOM Year 1: 148K users
